document_id: 2nd qtr 2017 gas 1278 ifta fuel tax rates

findings.description: The NCDOR logo/header graphic from the PDF is not present in the HTML
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 has the NCDOR logo in the top-left corner; HTML has only plain text 'NCDOR'

findings.description: The header layout differs - PDF has a multi-column header with logo, title, and North Carolina Department info side by side; HTML renders these as stacked text blocks
findings.evidence: PDF: logo left, title center, department info right in a horizontal layout. HTML: stacked vertically as plain text

findings.description: Table header formatting differs slightly - 'Liquid Natural Gas' column header wrapping differs but data is intact
findings.evidence: PDF shows 'Liquid Natural Gas (Gallons)' as a compact multi-line header; HTML shows it similarly but with different line breaks

findings.description: The form number 'GAS-1278' is styled differently - PDF shows it as a large bold header next to the logo, HTML shows it as a standalone heading
findings.evidence: PDF: GAS-1278 appears large and bold inline with header. HTML: rendered as a separate H1-style heading

findings.description: Table data is complete and correctly structured across both pages - all rows and columns match between PDF and HTML
findings.evidence: All state/province rows with their corresponding tax rates are present and correctly aligned in both versions

findings.description: Page 2 header is simplified in HTML compared to PDF which has 'Page 2, Gas 1278, Web, 6-17' in a specific layout
findings.evidence: PDF: compact page identifier in top-left. HTML: rendered as plain text paragraph

findings.description: The footer note about IFTA Inc website is positioned differently but present in both versions
findings.evidence: PDF: footer at bottom of page 2. HTML: appears at bottom of the scrollable content
